questions.text: If $a + b + c = 8$ and $ab + bc + ca = 12$, find the value of $a^3 + b^3 + c^3 - 3abc$.
If $\tan \theta + \cot \theta = 5$, find the value of $\tan^2 \theta + \cot^2 \theta$.
Two chords AB and CD of a circle intersect at O inside the circle. If $AO = 4$ cm, $OB = 6$ cm, and $CO = 3$ cm, find the length of OD.
What is the least value of $x$ such that the 7-digit number $67x3245$ is exactly divisible by 11?
A shopkeeper allows a discount of 20% on the marked price of an article and still makes a profit of 25%. If the cost price of the article is Rs 320, find its marked price.
A and B can do a piece of work in 12 days, B and C in 15 days, and C and A in 20 days. In how many days can A alone complete the same work?
A train running at 72 km/hr crosses a vertical pole in 15 seconds. How long will it take to cross a platform 200 m long?
Find the compound interest on Rs 8000 for 2 years at 15% per annum, compounded annually.
The radius and height of a right circular cylinder are in the ratio 4:7 and its volume is $2816\text{ cm}^3$. Find its radius. (Use $\pi = 22/7$)
The average age of 24 students and their class teacher is 16 years. If the teacher's age is excluded, the average reduces by 1 year. What is the age of the teacher?
A sum of Rs 4200 is divided among A, B, and C such that A's share : B's share = 2 : 3 and B's share : C's share = 4 : 5. Find the share of B.
In an examination, 35% of the candidates failed in Mathematics and 25% failed in English. If 10% failed in both subjects, then what percent of candidates passed in both the subjects?
If $x^2 - 3x + 1 = 0$, find the value of $x^3 + \frac{1}{x^3}$.
In what ratio must a grocer mix two varieties of pulses costing Rs 60 per kg and Rs 75 per kg so as to get a mixture worth Rs 65 per kg?
In $\triangle ABC$, the internal bisectors of $\angle B$ and $\angle C$ meet at a point $O$. If $\angle A = 70^\circ$, find the measure of $\angle BOC$.
The angle of elevation of the top of a tower from a point 30 m away from its foot on the ground is $60^\circ$. Find the height of the tower.
Find the value of $\frac{\sin 30^\circ + \tan 45^\circ - \csc 60^\circ}{\sec 30^\circ + \cos 60^\circ + \cot 45^\circ}$.
Find the remainder when $17^{200}$ is divided by 18.

Two trains start at the same time from stations A and B and proceed towards each other at the speed of 45 km/hr and 55 km/hr, respectively. When they meet, it is found that one train has travelled 40 km more than the other. Find the distance between A and B.
The curved surface area of a right circular cone is $156\pi\text{ cm}^2$ and the radius of its base is 12 cm. Find its volume.
A man sells two articles for Rs 2400 each. On one he gains 20% and on the other he loses 20%. Find his overall profit or loss percentage.

A and B entered into a partnership by investing Rs 15,000 and Rs 20,000 respectively. After 4 months, C joined them with an investment of Rs 25,000. Find C's share in a total annual profit of Rs 15,500.
If $3^{x+y} = 81$ and $81^{x-y} = 3$, find the value of $x$.
PA and PB are two tangents from an external point P to a circle with centre O. If $\angle APB = 50^\circ$, then what is the measure of $\angle OAB$?
A sum of money becomes $\frac{8}{5}$ of itself in 5 years at a certain rate of simple interest. Find the rate of interest per annum.
